differential_diagnoses: Delirium secondary to metabolic or medication factors
next_steps: Continuous video-EEG monitoring to differentiate ictal/postictal events from interictal psychosis
Comprehensive metabolic panel and toxicology screening
Lumbar puncture for CSF analysis to rule out autoimmune or paraneoplastic limbic encephalitis
Brain MRI with dedicated epilepsy protocol and contrast if not already performed
Multidisciplinary team review involving psychiatry and epilepsy specialists
Transition to a stable, non-sedating antiseizure medication regimen
Consultation for surgical epilepsy evaluation if concordant focus is confirmed
